message:
docs(outcome): fix unresolved doc link warnings

Remove type parameters from Outcome variant links in module docs.
- `Outcome::Ok(T)` → `Outcome::Ok`
- `Outcome::Err(E)` → `Outcome::Err`
- `Outcome::Cancelled(CancelReason)` → `Outcome::Cancelled`
- `Outcome::Panicked(PanicPayload)` → `Outcome::Panicked`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
